partners.name: Harry's Handies
partners.teaser: A fast-growing handheld food concept with an affordable entry point and strong multi-site operator network across major UK cities.
highlights: Low entry investment
Multi-site friendly
Rapid setup

partners.name: Ben's Burritos
partners.teaser: A vibrant Mexican street food brand with a strong identity and growing presence across key UK locations.
highlights: Established brand
Full training provided
Exclusive territories

partners.name: Super Sushi
partners.teaser: A premium sushi concept bringing authentic Japanese dining to high-footfall UK locations, with proven systems and full operational support.
highlights: Premium market positioning
Growing UK demand
Comprehensive support

partners.name: Jungle Juice
partners.teaser: A bold tropical drinks brand riding the health and premium beverage trend across UK high streets and shopping centres.
highlights: Low overhead
Health trend tailwind
Flexible site formats

partners.name: Zendöner
partners.teaser: A technology-driven fast casual döner brand using automated kitchen systems to deliver consistent premium quality at scale — no food experience required.
highlights: Automated kitchen tech — consistent premium product, no food experience needed
Semi-absentee model: operated by an approved GM, not hands-on
18-month break-even target | €40,000 franchise fee | 7% royalty, no hidden fees

partners.name: Zambrero
partners.teaser: A fresh, healthy Mexican fusion concept with a powerful social mission — for every meal sold, one is donated to someone in need through the Plate 4 Plate programme. Fully standardised operations mean no prior food experience is required.
highlights: Plate 4 Plate social mission — every meal sold donates a meal to someone in need
No prior food experience needed — fully standardised operations
Pioneer opportunity: 4–6 sites available in Greater Manchester & West Yorkshire

partners.name: Oakberry
partners.teaser: A globally recognised premium açaí brand with a vertically integrated supply chain and simple, high-margin store operations across dine-in, takeaway, and kiosk formats — no complex supplier management required.
highlights: Globally recognised açaí brand — centralised supply chain, simple day-to-day operations
High-margin model: 70% in-store, 30% delivery | 6% royalty + 2% marketing
2-year break-even target | Priority sites in London & Manchester

partners.name: Paradice
partners.teaser: A premium handmade gelato and artisan coffee concept blending Italian tradition with a modern British identity. Available as a kiosk or full café format, with centralised gelato supply keeping quality consistent across all sites — no hospitality experience required.
highlights: Kiosk or full café format — flexible entry point with centralised gelato supply
£15,000 franchise fee | 5% royalty + 1% marketing | full training & ops manuals provided
Target locations across London & Surrey — mock P&L and site list available
